channel.title: Journal of Ancient Near Eastern History
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Ancient Near Eastern History

item.title: Introduction
item.description: Article by Vassilis Petrakis DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/janeh-2024-0024

item.title: Prestige on Display: Markers of Economic and Social Status in Ur III Babylonia
item.description: Article by Vassilis Petrakis DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/janeh-2024-0005

item.title: Assyrian Imperial Elites and Textile Culture of the 1st Millennium BC: Shaping Power Visions Through Textiles
item.description: Article by Vassilis Petrakis DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/janeh-2024-0003

item.title: Royal Dress and the Expression of Power in Babylonia, First Millennium BCE
item.description: Article by Vassilis Petrakis DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/janeh-2024-0007

item.title: Cypriot Fabrics? White Slip Pottery and Élite Linen Clothes of the Late Bronze Age
item.description: Article by Vassilis Petrakis DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/janeh-2024-0011

item.title: Status in a Nutshell. A Praxeological/Phenomenological Approach to Seals as Power Accessories
item.description: Article by Vassilis Petrakis DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/janeh-2024-0006

item.title: The Scarf and the Cloak Prestige Garments for Aegean Elites
item.description: Article by Vassilis Petrakis DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/janeh-2024-0008

item.title: Colour-Coding Aegean Elites: Status and Cultural Identities in Linear B Dyed Textiles and Late Bronze Age Socio-Political Changes
item.description: Article by Vassilis Petrakis DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/janeh-2024-0019

item.title: Seated in Power: A Look at “Participatory” Imaging of Thrones and (Foot)stools in the Mycenaean Palatial World
item.description: Article by Vassilis Petrakis DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/janeh-2024-0002
